nasb.text: He made for the altar a grating of bronze network beneath, under its ledge, reaching halfway up.

esv.text: And he made for the altar a grating, a network of bronze, under its ledge, extending halfway down.

cnv.text: 又替壇做一個銅網，放在壇的圍腰板以下，向下直到壇的半腰。

ccb.text: 又造了一个铜网，铜网在祭坛围边的下方，向下伸展到祭坛的腰部，
